mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO c_user (phone, email, username, password, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, status, password_error_count, lock_time, remember_login, identity_default, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.gender}, #{item.birthday}, #{item.status}, #{item.passwordErrorCount}, #{item.lockTime}, #{item.rememberLogin}, #{item.identityDefault}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO c_user (phone, email, username, password, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, status, password_error_count, lock_time, remember_login, identity_default, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.gender}, #{item.birthday}, #{item.status}, #{item.passwordErrorCount}, #{item.lockTime}, #{item.rememberLogin}, #{item.identityDefault}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE phone = VALUES(phone), email = VALUES(email), nickname = VALUES(nickname), avatar = VALUES(avatar), gender = VALUES(gender), birthday = VALUES(birthday), status = VALUES(status), password_error_count = VALUES(password_error_count), lock_time = VALUES(lock_time), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
